elements.content: Sub-millisecond wallet operations. No waiting for signatures or confirmations.
Desktop-class speed on mobile. Same codebase runs everywhere.
Memory-safe Rust + Zig. No hidden dependencies or supply chain risk.

Unlike wallets built on slow frameworks, Quantum Vault uses a hybrid Rust/Zig architecture. Rust provides memory safety for the application. Zig accelerates cryptography, document generation, and data processing — delivering institutional-grade performance on consumer hardware.

Dual-jurisdiction structure for UK and EU regulatory compliance

Quantum Vault is a self-custodial wallet — we do not custody user funds or hold user assets. For fiat on/off ramp services, we rely on our payment partner's KYC/AML processes for end-user verification. We implement security measures including PIN protection, biometric authentication, and hardware wallet integration for enhanced security. No user data is transmitted to Quantum Encoding servers.
